sourceMovie.title: Time Trap
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Time Trap works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Interstellar
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Time Trap clicked for you, Interstellar (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Time Trap?
faq.answer: Try Interstellar, Star Trek, Mad Max—each shares DNA with Time Trap while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Time Trap?
faq.answer: Time Trap (2018) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Time Trap worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
